caseStudies.title: Redesigning onboarding to improve identity accuracy
caseStudies.description: The work focused on simplifying entry, improving data accuracy, and delivering a scalable onboarding foundation across B2C, B2B, and direct consult users so people land in the right place without guessing

chatbot.title: Case Study 1 — Doctor Anywhere onboarding
chatbot.answer: Case Study 1 covers identity-first onboarding at Doctor Anywhere, consolidating flows and improving data accuracy for B2C/B2B users while meeting MOH compliance.

caseStudies.title: SODA HR Portal — Self-serve employee benefits
caseStudies.description: Built a self-serve HR portal so SME owners and HR teams can set up policies, create plans, and manage employees without brokers.

chatbot.title: Case Study 3 — SODA HR Portal
chatbot.answer: Case Study 3 highlights the SODA HR Portal, a self-serve benefits platform for SME owners and HR teams to set up plans and manage employees without intermediaries.

caseStudies.title: Building design system using Cursor
caseStudies.description: Built a functional Storybook from scratch using Cursor AI to bridge design and engineering — enabling engineers to access production-ready code from Figma components.

chatbot.title: Case Study 4 — Gravity Storybook
chatbot.answer: Case Study 4 covers building the Gravity Design System Storybook from scratch using Cursor AI — a functional code reference for engineers alongside Figma.
